headline: Following Buybacks And Dividend, Is Fastenal (FAST) Fully Priced?
summary: Fastenal (FAST) is back in focus after the board approved a cash dividend of $0.26 per share and disclosed second quarter repurchases of 650,000 shares under its ongoing buyback authorization. See our latest analysis for Fastenal. At a share price of US$46.49, Fastenal has seen its 7 day share price return fall 4.34%, while the year to date share price return of 14.96% sits alongside a 5 year total shareholder return of 95.64%. This suggests that long term holders have been rewarded even as...
